project.name: Hero: The Summer 2026 E-Bike Law Map Is Getting Weird

data.label: Style
data.name: Noir Comic Book
data.description: Noir comic book illustration style. Heavy black ink lines, high contrast shading, cel-shaded shadows. Hand-drawn graphic novel aesthetic with bold outlines. Muted palette with selective color pops. Stylized, not photorealistic. No text, watermarks, speech bubbles, or white borders. Edge-to-edge composition filling the entire frame.

data.label: Action
data.content: An e-bike rider pauses at a three-way state-line crossroads at dusk, phone route map glowing on the handlebars, surrounded by scattered registration papers, license plates, bike-lane bollards, and the silhouette of a more powerful electric motorcycle in the distance. Summer storm clouds and humid city light, comic book illustration influenced by Moebius and Geof Darrow, heavy ink linework, chiaroscuro, cel-shaded shadows, muted urban grays with electric teal accents, edge-to-edge composition, no text.

data.label: Avoid
data.content: Never include Lemmy Kilmister, Motörhead imagery, metal bassists in leather jackets, or self-portraits of rock legends. No generic punk rockers with mohawks unless specifically requested. Focus on the actual subject matter described in the scene.
